summary:
The Shine-Dalgarno sequence in bacterial mRNA bases pair with the 16S rRNA of the small ribosomal subunit to initiate translation by ensuring proper placement of the start codon. This mechanism is specific to prokaryotes and enables accurate ribosome-mRNA association during protein synthesis.  

Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{B}}$
